title: Nigerian Rowers
description: One of my favorites! The reflection standing in for water was visually interesting to me.

title: Plane Crane
description: I like how the crane is framed here more than anything, the plane was a bonus.

title: Corcaigh ag luí na gréine
description: I have a mild obsession with trying to take the perfect photo at this spot.

title: Vinyl Setup
description: An early picture of a corner of my room dedicated to music, books, art, gifts and souvenirs.

title: Corcaigh
description: I love the red light cast on the glasses in contrast with the white light illuminating the dartboard.

title: Wicked Wasp vs Bumblebee
description: I got really lucky with this one, the wasp came out of nowhere ready to fight to the death.

title: Succulent Scran
description: Lovely artwork inside Boojum in the city, even just typing this is making me hungry ngl...

title: Áth Fhada ag luí na gréine
description: I come to this spot every summer solstice, in 2025 the clouds blocked the fucking sun.

title: Northern Lights at Home
description: Not often the northern lights are visible near me, I was so locked in trying to get this while drunk.

title: Windshield Bee
description: This little fella decided to take a break on my windshield, this is one of my favorite macros.

title: Housing Crisis
description: I love this art a lot, I found out later that there's actually another one of these up in dublin too.

title: Cherry Wine Live
description: I saw Hozier on the 5th of July 2024, with my sister and a close friend, 10/10 would go again.

title: Zealous Zebra Spider
description: Another macro shot I'm really proud of, I love how much detail I was able to actually capture.
